description: HTTPS registry URLs, record-session wording fix
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(init): accept HTTPS URLs for --registry option — auto-converts GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket URLs to giget format (#87)
- fix(templates): clarify record-session commit rule so AI models run metadata scripts without refusing (#88)
notes: Run `trellis update` to sync updated record-session templates.
